http.cookies/Morsel/update.name: update
http.cookies/Morsel/update.description: Update the values in the Morsel dictionary with the values in the dictionary values. Raise an error if any of the keys in the values dict is not a valid RFC 2109 attribute. Changed in version 3.5: an error is raised for invalid keys.
